economic_notes: Simpcw Resources LLP (with interests in Estsek Environmental Services LLP, Tmicw-kt Cultural Services LLP, and Simpcw Ledcor Limited Partnership) generated net income of $72,992,217. Simpcw Resources 2020 LLP had a net loss of $242,189. New multi-purpose facility planned with budget of $30,932,690; $1,734,383 incurred to date with $6,614,955 in secured grants. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership (0.47% interest) distributed $758,467.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). The dominant revenue item is equity income from government business enterprises ($72,755,028) primarily from Simpcw Resources LLP which earned $72,992,217 net income — this drives the large annual surplus of $77,583,242. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Five entities fully consolidated including Simpcw Holdings Limited and Social Housing Fund. Accumulated surplus per statement of accumulated surplus is $227,415,841 but Note A12 shows $227,810,692 including remeasurement gains of $394,851. Restricted cash of $530,741 includes Ottawa Trust Funds. Defined contribution pension plan with 5.5% employee rate. Loan guarantee to Simpcw Resources LLP of $900,000 (loan balance $622,283). New PSAS standards (PS 3450, PS 3041) adopted April 1, 2022 with opening remeasurement gain adjustment of $831,231. Segmented schedule (Appendix 2) was truncated in source document.
